Flow.description: ALN-293: Adjust time fields for Allowance Hours, add in decision outcome for Allowance Hours to update shift. Add in missing variables for Allowance Hours assignment element ALN-479 - Correct start/end time quantities to cater for over midnight and 24h period. ALN-479 - Removed Allowance Hours Frequency from setting 'allowance only' to true

formulas.name: frmCustomRuleName
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get_Selected_Custom_Rule.Payee_Allowance_Record__c})), "Employee Claimed Allowance - " & {!Get_Selected_Custom_Rule.Payee_Allowance_Record__r.Name}, IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get_Selected_Custom_Rule.Timesheet_Activity__c})), "Employee Claimed Timesheet Activity - " & {!Get_Selected_Custom_Rule.Timesheet_Activity__r.Name}, "Employee Claimed Payment Rule - " & {!Get_Selected_Custom_Rule.Award_Classification__r.Name} + " " + {!Get_Selected_Custom_Rule.Award_Level__r.Name} ))

formulas.name: frmSETimestoQuantity
formulas.expression: IF( HOUR({!frmConvertEndTime}) - HOUR({!frmConvertStartTime}) = 0, 24, IF( HOUR({!frmConvertEndTime}) - HOUR({!frmConvertStartTime}) < 0, (HOUR({!frmConvertEndTime}) - HOUR({!frmConvertStartTime})) * -1, HOUR({!frmConvertEndTime}) - HOUR({!frmConvertStartTime}) ) )

Flow.label: Community - Manage Allowances

loops.name: Loop_Custom_Rules_to_Remove_Duplicates
loops.label: Loop Custom Rules to Remove Duplicates

recordLookups.name: Get_ALL_Custom_Rule_Allowances
recordLookups.label: Get ALL Custom Rule Allowances
recordLookups.filterLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR (4 AND 10) OR 5) AND 6 AND 7 AND (8 OR 9)

recordLookups.name: Get_Custom_Rule_MPR
recordLookups.label: Get Custom Rule MPR
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 9 AND (7 OR 8)

value.stringValue: Rates Successfully Assigned from Custom Rule - Employee Claimed
No Custom Rule MPR Found - Employee Claimed

fields.name: txtQuantity
fields.fieldText: The selected Allowance requires you to enter a quantity.

fields.name: StartEndTimes
fields.fieldText: The selected Allowance requires you to enter Start and End times.

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid time input - e.g. 14:00:00, 01:00:00.
Please enter a valid time input - e.g. 14:00:00, 01:00:00.

fields.name: txtnoclaimableallowances
fields.fieldText: Allowances cannot be claimed for this Shift.

fields.name: txtnomoreclaims
fields.fieldText: No more allowances can be claimed for this shift.

fields.name: txtShift
fields.fieldText: Allowances cannot be loaded for this Shift.

fields.name: txtApproved
fields.fieldText:
This Shift has already been approved and cannot be edited.

﻿

fields.name: txtCancel
fields.fieldText: To update a quantity, cancel the allowance and claim a new one.
